name: Peachy Raspberry Soda
recipeInstructions:
1. Extract juice from the peaches using a juice extractor (yielding about 1 cup).
2. Pour approximately 1/4 cup of peach juice into each of four short, wide glasses.
3. Add one scoop of raspberry sherbet to each glass.
4. Fill the glasses with chilled sugar-free ginger ale.
5. Serve and enjoy 4 servings.
